title: Tumblestone Legends
description: Adds tumblestone world generation for Cobblemon
body:
Upcoming updates:
support for older versions and configuration.

![Black tumblestone generated in the cave.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4fcee4c0de80f705aceeb58175f42ad80351be70.jpeg)

Would you like to have tumblestones throughout the world and in the deep, dark caves? This mod adds world generation for tumblestone, black tumblestone, and sky tumblestone.

It works on both client and server sides. Client side is optional.

Features:
- Tumblestone: Found commonly everywhere.
- Black Tumblestone: More likely to be found in deeper caves.
- Sky Tumblestone: More likely to be found on hills and mountains.
- Includes cluster, large, medium, and small budding tumblestones.
- Advanced generation using uniform and trapezoidal.

Dependencies:
- Cobblemon

Note:
You may add this mod to your modpacks.
